name: Minestone Soup
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Can EDEN Diced Tomatoes with Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions and set aside.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add onions and garlic; saute until the onions are translucent.
4. Stir in potato, celery, and water. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
5. Mix in tomatoes with green chilies, kidney beans, and red pepper. Cook for 2 minutes.
6. Fold in cilantro and shoyu.
Prep Time: 30 minutes
Cooking Time: 20 minutes
Yield: 4-5 servings
